zh.lifeSummary: Mary Talmasche於1179年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。她於1198年與Sir Peter Talmasche在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在英國哈普爾巴頓 斯特西。

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Talmasche was born in 1179, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Peter Talmasche in 1198, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Barton Stacey, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Talmascheは1179年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた。1198年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでSir Peter Talmascheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスハンプシュアイアバートン スタセイで死去した。

ko.Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Talmasche(은)는 1179년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1198년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Sir Peter Talmasche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 함프실르 바턴 스테스이에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Talmasche родилась в 1179 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter Talmasche в 1198 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности бартон стеиси, хампшир, Англия.
